turn.speaker: 架构师老张
turn.content: 好，我们今天来梳理一下UnifiedAgent系统的完整架构。先从最核心的部分开始——用户如何与系统交互。

turn.speaker: 工程师小林
turn.content: 用户层应该是多入口的，CLI命令行、Web界面，还有API接口。我来先把USER和ORCHESTRATION这两个分组建好。

turn.speaker: 架构师老张
turn.content: 对，ORCHESTRATION层就是核心的UnifiedAgent。它负责任务分类、权限控制、工具分发和响应构建。这是最关键的中枢节点。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    CLI["🖥️ CLI Interface<br/unified-agent"]
    Web["🌐 Web UI<br/unified-agent-web"]
    API["🔌 API Server<br/unified-agent-api"]
    DISPATCH["🚦 Task Dispatcher<br/unified-agent"]

turn.speaker: 工程师小王
turn.content: CAPABILITIES层我来处理。工具按能力分类：T_DATA是数据发现类，6个工具；T_MGMT是数据管理，4个工具；T_WF是工作流，5个工具；T_EXEC是执行类，8个工具。

    Web["🌐 Web UI<br/unified-agent-web"]
    API["🔌 API Server<br/unified-agent-api"]
    DISPATCH["🚦 Task Dispatcher<br/unified-agent"]

turn.speaker: 工程师小林
turn.content: SERVICES分组暂时标记为Core Services，为后续扩展预留。整个系统的骨架现在有5个分组，8个主要节点，0条边。

turn.speaker: 工程师小王
turn.content: CORE分组来了。CommandSandbox保证安全执行，AuditLogger记录完整审计轨迹，FileOperations和ProcessManager处理文件和进程操作。

%%{Unified Agent - Task Flow}}%%
flowchart TB
    subgraph USER["👤 User Interface Layer"]
        CLI["🖥️ CLI Interface<br/unified-agent"]
        WEB["🌐 Web UI<br/unified-agent-web"]
        API["🔌 API Server<br/unified-agent-api"]
    end
    subgraph ORCHESTRATION["🎭 Orchestration Layer"]
        DISPATCH["🚦 Task Dispatcher<br/unified-agent"]
        LIFECYCLE["🔄 Lifecycle Manager<br/unified-agent"]
    end
    subgraph PLANNING["📋 Planning Layer"]
        PLANNER["🧠 Task Planner<br/unified-agent-planner"]
        DECOMPOSER["✂️ Task Decomposer<br/unified-agent-planner"]
        SEQUENCER["🔗 Task Sequencer<br/unified-agent-planner"]
    end
    subgraph EXECUTION["⚡ Execution Layer"]
        WORKER["🔨 Task Worker<br/unified-agent-worker"]
        TOOL_EXEC["🛠️ Tool Executor<br/unified-agent-worker"]
        CONTEXT["📦 Context Manager<br/unified-agent-worker"]
    end
    subgraph TOOLS["🧰 Tool Layer"]
        FILE["📁 File System<br/unified-agent-tools"]
        SEARCH["🔍 Search<br/unified-agent-tools"]
        CODE["💻 Code Analysis<br/unified-agent-tools"]
        SHELL["💻 Shell Commands<br/unified-agent-tools"]
        NOTE["📝 Note Management<br/unified-agent-tools"]
        NLP["🧠 NLP Tools<br/unified-agent-tools"]
    end
    subgraph STORAGE["💾 Storage Layer"]
        HISTORY["📜 Task History<br/unified-agent-history"]
        STATE["💾 State Manager<br/unified-agent-history"]
        LOGS["📊 Logging<br/unified-agent-history"]
    end
    subgraph AUTONOMOUS["🤖 Autonomous Mode"]
        PERCEPTION["👁️ Perception Module<br/unified-agent-autonomous"]
        PLANNER_AUTO["🧠 Planning Module<br/unified-agent-autonomous"]
        EXEC["🔧 Execution Module<br/unified-agent-autonomous"]
        MONITOR["📊 Monitoring Module<br/unified-agent-autonomous"]
    end
    subgraph EXECUTOR["⚡ Executor"]
        EXEC["🔧 Execution Module<br/unified-agent-autonomous"]
    end
    %% User Entry Points
    CLI -- DISPATCH
    WEB -- API
    API -- DISPATCH
    %% Orchestration
    DISPATCH -- LIFECYCLE
    %% Planning
    LIFECYCLE -- PLANNER
    PLANNER -- DECOMPOSER
    DECOMPOSER -- SEQUENCER
    %% Execution
    SEQUENCER -- WORKER
    WORKER -- TOOL_EXEC
    TOOL_EXEC -- CONTEXT
    %% Tools
    TOOL_EXEC -- FILE
    TOOL_EXEC -- SEARCH
    TOOL_EXEC -- CODE
    TOOL_EXEC -- SHELL
    TOOL_EXEC -- NOTE
    TOOL_EXEC -- NLP
    %% Storage
    WORKER -- HISTORY
    HISTORY -- STATE
    HISTORY -- LOGS
    %% Context
    CONTEXT -- WORKER
    %% Autonomous Mode
    PERCEPTION -- PLANNER_AUTO
    PLANNER_AUTO -- EXEC
    EXEC -- MONITOR
    MONITOR -- PERCEPTION
    %% Styling
    classDef userLayer fill:#E3F2FD,stroke:#1565C0,stroke-width:2px
    classDef orchestrationLayer fill:#FFF8E1,stroke:#F9A825,stroke-width:2px
    classDef planningLayer fill:#F3E5F5,stroke:#7B1FA2,stroke-width:2px
    classDef executionLayer fill:#E8F5E9,stroke:#2E7D32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef toolLayer fill:#FBE9E7,stroke:#D84315,stroke-width:2px
    classDef storageLayer fill:#ECEFF1,stroke:#455A64,stroke-width:2px
    class USER,CLI,WEB,API userLayer
    class ORCHESTRATION,DISPATCH,LIFECYCLE orchestrationLayer

    class EXECUTION,WORKER,TOOL_EXEC,CONTEXT executionLayer
